interventions.name: C1 Intervention 1
interventions.summary: one-change-at-a-time routines that restrict revision to one step per attempt

interventions.name: C1 Intervention 2
interventions.summary: error-location prompts that compare intended and actual outcomes side by side

interventions.name: C1 Intervention 3
interventions.summary: short persistence cycles with visible progress markers after each attempt

interventions.name: C1 Intervention 4
interventions.summary: before-and-after checks that force explicit comparison after a revision
